creator: toj@gorilla.net
text:
On Mon, Jun 23, 1997 at 10:52:01PM -0700, Satoshi Asami wrote:
>  * > The problem is simple to solve. It was due to changes in dirent.h.
>  * > Just copy the three patch files below to the patches dir under names 
>  * > patch-ar, patch-as and patch-at.
>  * > Don't forget to do a "make clean" before starting the compilation in order 
>  * > to apply all the patches.
>  * > 
>  * > Paulo
> 
> I seem to have missed the mail including these patches, can you resend 
> it?  (As an "all" reply to this mail.)
> 
> Satoshi

here it is, it fixed a break in current:


From paulo@isr.uc.pt  Sun Jun 22 16:39:23 1997
Received: from mail.gorilla.net (peeper.my.domain [192.168.1.1]) by peeper.my.domain (8.8.5/8.7.3) with ESMTP id QAA22519 for <tom>; Sun, 22 Jun 1997 16:39:21 -0500 (CDT)
Received: from speedy.isr.uc.PT (speedy.isr.uc.PT [193.136.230.52]) by silverback.gorilla.net (NTMail 3.02.10) with ESMTP id toj for <toj@gorilla.net>; Sun, 22 Jun 1997 11:30:46 -0500
Received: from localhost (paulo@localhost)
	by speedy.isr.uc.pt (8.8.5/8.8.5) with SMTP id RAA00495;
	Sun, 22 Jun 1997 17:32:34 +0100 (WEST)
Date: Sun, 22 Jun 1997 17:32:34 +0100 (WEST)
From: Paulo Menezes <paulo@isr.uc.pt>
Reply-To: Paulo Menezes <paulo@isr.uc.pt>
To: Tom Jackson <toj@gorilla.net>
cc: FreeBSD-ports@FreeBSD.ORG
Subject: Re: ports/3867: Scilab-2.3 Port - FIXED
In-Reply-To: <19970621213951.41725@peeper.my.domain>
Message-ID: <Pine.BSF.3.95q.970622171144.392A-100000@speedy.isr.uc.pt>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: TEXT/PLAIN; charset=US-ASCII
Status: RO
Content-Length: 1616
Lines: 67


Hi,

The problem is simple to solve. It was due to changes in dirent.h.
Just copy the three patch files below to the patches dir under names 
patch-ar, patch-as and patch-at.
Don't forget to do a "make clean" before starting the compilation in order 
to apply all the patches.

Paulo

*** patch-ar
*** ./routines/metanet/loadg.c.old	Sun Jun 22 16:54:55 1997
--- ./routines/metanet/loadg.c	Sun Jun 22 16:55:26 1997
***************
*** 1,5 ****
--- 1,8 ----
  #include <stdio.h>
  #ifndef __MSC__
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+ #include <sys/types.h>
+ #endif
  #include <dirent.h>
  #endif
  #include <string.h>

*** patch-as
*** ./routines/metanet/saveg.c.old	Sun Jun 22 16:56:33 1997
--- ./routines/metanet/saveg.c	Sun Jun 22 16:56:53 1997
***************
*** 1,5 ****
--- 1,8 ----
  #include <stdio.h>
  #ifndef __MSC__
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+ #include <sys/types.h>
+ #endif
  #include <dirent.h>
  #endif
  #include <string.h>


*** patch-at
*** ./routines/metanet/files.c.old	Sun Jun 22 16:57:23 1997
--- ./routines/metanet/files.c	Sun Jun 22 16:58:16 1997
***************
*** 1,5 ****
--- 1,8 ----
  #include <stdio.h>
  #ifndef __MSC__
+ #ifdef __FreeBSD__
+ #include <sys/types.h>
+ #endif
  #include <dirent.h>
  #endif
  #include <string.h>


         __/%\__ 
      ... ('-') ...
